reviews.review_description: So the game is great and all but I want single player and endless mode. So basically single player there is 3 npcs and if you go to the menu there is an option called npc talk. So on npc talk the game will pause and there is quick chat so for example nozzle jockey can you pass me the oil? And stuff. And you can choose whatever worker you want to play as. And the maps you wanna play is your choice. Endless mode is where there are no last call and end. And endless mode can be in codes and single player. That’s my recommendation please work on this for the next update. Edit: DID YALL HEAR MY PRAYERS?!

developer_response.body: Heard and appreciated! This specific suggestion is actually one we've gotten quite a bit from the community so the team is aware of this want. For now we have the solo practice experiment mode you can check out!

reviews.review_description: Had super high hopes for this game since seeing the trailer, and thought oh okay multiplayer neat, but forced multiplayer is lame meaning you can’t play solo you have to have others. What a disappointing download and uninstall, got in and did the tutorial and went to play and it says waiting for players immediately deleted. On top of that why make a game forced to use wonky hand physics?? They suck let us use the controllers and then use our hands if we choose to.

Super fun but please add a single player I love playing this game every time I play multiplayer it lags sooooo much when my WiFi is literally perfect but when I'm in solo practice it doesn't lag at all but again my WiFi is perfect and when I played with my friend it lag sooo much that we could barely open out menus but his WiFi is perfect and so is mine so please fix this or add single player please.

I purchased an add-on assuming it would give me access to play solo 😣.... I was wrong. I never have any game to join so I'm stuck doing practice mode over and over. I like the game but I don't to have to wait until someone wants to play and is available at the exact same time Im available.

developer_response.body: Check out our Group Finder channel in our Discord. It's the ultimate co-working zone to find other players in the community (Discord.gg/owlchemylabs) to group up with!

reviews.review_description: after when i got home from work someone my wife told me that there's a game called double shift so i went on the metal store to buy it by the way it doesn't cost money like most games that i play cost money is there good this also takes hand tracking add me i don't really use hand tracking until this game so i get why it's called double shift

developer_response.body: We're so glad you enjoyed your shifts!

reviews.review_description: the game is great but I wish a full single player for both the garage and the diner and maybe Endless mode The hand tracking is hard to use  thing keep falling and can get glitchy trying to grab things but that might just be me having limited mobility in my hands and used to only controllers love everything this company makes  it’s a great game otherwise

The game is really fun but I wish you were able to play the mechanic mode by yourself. And you don’t get much time to complete all the orders so I think it would be cool to add some type of endless mode or add more time to complete it.

developer_response.body:
Only one member of your squad needs to snag a Dimension Pack for the whole crew to experience it. Our Discord is the ultimate co-working zone if you're looking to group up with others to check out the latest content without buying it. (discord.gg/owlchemylabs)

 As for stability our team is continually working to improve the overall experience so if you run into a potential bug, let us know so we can best investigate.

developer_response.body: We'd love to help you but first, we'll need a bit more information. Reach out to us in the Discord (discord.gg/owlchemylabs) or via email at owlchemysupport@google.com. We'll get you back to shifting!

reviews.review_description: I wish there was more stuff to do

reviews.review_title: PLEASE add a way to ONLY play one dlc
reviews.review_description:
I'm only saying that bc I own both dlcs ANNND the base game obvs. But it's overall fun. 
But!  Going from Joysey to Hexas *SOMETIMES* breaks the game and the voice lines, sometimes the things IN the mini games too. 
(Like some of the items floating when there's nobody in that job area BUT it's still there)
It gets annoying to have to leave the lobby because you get stuck in the voting area. So please, I BEG of someone. Make it to where you don't have to go in and gamble for it. Just to have a way to go to Joysey and Hexas as a teleport to ONLY do the mini games in those dimensions. 
Everything else is fine though. The items and everything else is fabulous.

The game was fun and has potential, but the fact you cannot use the controllers at all makes it incredibly frustrating. Also, the timed "overtime" should not be part of the main mission. It could be optional though. And do wish there was more to do in the game. But other than all that, it's a decent, fun, free game.
Its so Fun and funny just don't buy new joysey

The game is great don't get me wrong but the idea of only hand tracking is kinda weird in my opinion because hand tracking is kinda glitch on my vr and I think that the game should be able to use controllers
The game is very fun for multiple players, unfortunately it's only getting new paid game modes, the free players do not get new game modes

developer_response.body: You might not have seen our weekend B.O.O.S.T.E.R.S! We have a new one coming out this weekend which puts a new twist on the gameplay you love.

reviews.review_description: Fun with friends, but gets boring after a while if you don’t buy the dlcs

developer_response.body: Remember if your friend buys the DLC you can group up with them to still experience that dimension too! We also have rotating weekend matchmaking events in-game every week with new twists on the classic gameplay experience.

reviews.review_description: Love interacting and playing this game with my grandkids.  They live so far away and this game gives me a way to spend time making memories with them. It’s not so structured that any age over 3 yrs can do it!  I absolutely love that it’s multiplayer.  Unfortunately we are still having issues with connecting 3 to a chat line, however I believe that it’s due to the one child using the original headset. ( not sure why? )  I truly hope this game will expand into more interactive stations!!

developer_response.body: Absolutely love this! If you need help, we're happy to support you. Contact us at owlchemysupport@google.com.

reviews.review_description: I would really love to love this game but i dont. I am a huge fan of job simulator but i am simply very disapointed for the producers for putting out this game! the idea was great really i was so excited to download this, but within the first few minutes of playing the hand tracking was really off compared to using it in other game. The first time i opened the game it wouldn't even track my right hand. After leaving and re joining it tracked both but if i moved my hands more than two inches away it would glitch. I do think this game would be fun but ONLY WITH CONTROLERS! Don't waist your time on this game just by job simulator.

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear you ran into issues with hand tracking. We'd love to dive into this with you and see if there is troubleshooting that might help improve your experience. Reach out to us at owlchemysupport@google.com.

developer_response.body: We appreciate your feedback and we'll pass that along to the team.  As a note, if you prefer to play alone, you can also check out the Solo Practice Experiment mode or you can find reliable co-workers to team with in our Discord. (Discord.gg/owlchemylabs)

developer_response.body: We'd love to investigate any issues you're having in the Gas N' Grill. Our official Discord is a great place to report bugs so our Community Managers can relay all the details to our team. (Discord.gg/owlchemylabs) Happy shifting!

reviews.review_description: First, I really hate that you have to be in a private lobby to get rewards. developer_response.body: Ah, the "no friend" blues! We've all been there! 😉 But fear not, we've got a solution! Our Discord (discord.gg/OwlchemyLabs) is your one-stop shop for finding awesome teammates. Plus, we host "Team Building Experiments" in-game on the weekends where you can jump in and play with anyone, no pre-existing friend list needed!
